scenarios.title: Co-Scientist Capability Check: Researcher Discovery with Affiliations and Citations
scenarios.topic_fixture: LRRK2 inhibitor development in Parkinson's disease (example fixture)
scenarios.prompt: Find researchers who published on LRRK2 inhibitor development for Parkinson's disease between January 1, 2023 and February 17, 2026. Include affiliations and summarize evidence with citations.

scenarios.title: Co-Scientist Capability Check: Target-or-Trap Decision with Risks and Next Actions
scenarios.prompt: Target or Trap (as of February 17, 2026): should BACE1 still be pursued for Alzheimer's disease? Provide a risk assessment with evidence, explicit limitations, and next actions.

hitl_probe.title: Co-Scientist Capability Check: Predictable HITL Checkpoint
hitl_probe.topic_fixture: LRRK2 inhibitor development in Parkinson's disease (example fixture)
hitl_probe.prompt: Find researchers who published on LRRK2 inhibitor development for Parkinson's disease between January 1, 2023 and February 17, 2026.
